summary: The diff shows a comprehensive refactoring of the createAdminUser function with msg.caller-based authentication. All 6 requirements appear to be implemented: removal of hardcoded principals, use of msg.caller as admin ID, first-admin logic with super_admin role assignment, authorization checks for subsequent admins, duplicate prevention, and frontend updates to support the new backend behavior. However, REQ-6 cannot be fully verified as the complete final implementation is not visible due to file truncation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Display the complete final implementation of the refactored createAdminUser function after all changes are applied
missing_requirements.reason: The diff summary shows backend/main.mo is truncated at 4000 chars. The complete final implementation of createAdminUser is not visible in the provided diff output.

hallucinated_features.description: Creation of migration.mo module with comprehensive type definitions and data migration logic
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly states 'Do not create a new draft project; modify the existing Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang Version 61 project' and 'All changes must be isolated to the createAdminUser function implementation in backend/main.mo'. A new migration module was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Enhanced error classification and network error handling in useAdminUsers.ts
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest non-goals explicitly state 'Modifying other admin-related functions' and the requirements only concern backend createAdminUser changes. Frontend hook enhancements for error classification (isAuthError, isNetworkError functions) were not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: UI updates to AdminUserDialog showing automatic principal ID behavior and role assignment messaging
hallucinated_features.reason: While frontend updates may be necessary to support backend changes, the BuildRequest scope is 'All changes must be isolated to the createAdminUser function implementation in backend/main.mo'. Frontend UI messaging and form changes exceed this scope.
